title: Grey out some columns for privacy

posts.author: Ang (Dash)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be useful for us to have boards with some greyed out columns and the item of would only reveal themselves if you put the mouse on it.
It will definitely be great to have some infos not visible all the time and only visible when necessary.

What are you trying to achieve

To not expose some private info while browsing some boards and have them greyed until I want them visible.

posts.author: Atul (Atul | cloudvandana apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
better, show only the items that a person is assigned to, or when an explicit access is granted.

what do you think?
